items.title: Surveillance vendors caught abusing access to telcos to track people’s phone locations, researchers say
items.description: The Citizen Lab found two separate surveillance vendors abusing the backbone of cellular networks to spy on several victims across the world.

items.title: Meta will now allow parents to see the topics their child discussed with Meta AI
items.description: Topics can range from "School," "Entertainment," and "Lifestyle" to "Travel," "Writing," and "Health and Wellbeing," among others, Meta says.
